## Finding
Operator screenshots showed that the active .github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml file was still invalid after RM04B. Therefore RM04/RM04B/RM03B/RM04C/RM05 cannot be treated as final working-state proof for the Actions parser.

## Change
The invalid active workflow file was removed from .github/workflows. The intended validation contract is archived outside the active parser path until a safe YAML writer is available.

## Gate decision
Release PASS is false. The immediate goal is active parser cleanliness, not restored validation CI.

## Next
P11B verify invalid active workflow removed.
